vibe: Minimal, bold, edgy yet premium, artistic, hygienic, professional, and trustworthy.

layout_patterns.container_spacing: py-24 md:py-32 px-4 md:px-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto
layout_patterns.surface_strategy: Grid Borders and Glassmorphism (for sticky nav and popups). Minimal shadows, rely on high-contrast 1px strokes.

hero_carousel.style: Full width, max height 100vh. Dark overlay (bg-black/50) over images to maintain text contrast.
hero_carousel.animation: Fade transitions for images. Text enters from bottom with stagger via framer-motion.

lead_capture_popup.style: Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border border-[#556B2F]/40 rounded-none.
lead_capture_popup.behavior: Triggers 5-10s after load. Reappears every 30s if not dismissed or submitted.

whatsapp_sticky.style: Fixed bottom-right. Circular dark olive button with cream icon. Include a subtle infinite ping/pulse ring animation in #556B2F.

services_cards.style: Bento-style layout. 1px solid border, sharp corners or very subtle 4px radius. Large negative space inside.
services_cards.hover: Border changes to solid #556B2F, image inside scales up (scale-105).

work_gallery.interaction: Hover zoom (scale-105). Clicking opens a fullscreen lightbox with blurred background.

testimonials_marquee.style: Full-width marquee, 'react-fast-marquee'. Large outline text intertwined with standard review cards to create a 'Kinetic Texture'.

navigation.style: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-[#556B2F]/20.

hero_carousel.description: Tattoo artist focused in a modern studio

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, gallery items) MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute based on role (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-consultation-btn', data-testid='whatsapp-chat-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize optical alignment and negative space. Do not cram elements together.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Stick strictly to Clash Display / Outfit for headings and Satoshi / DM Sans for body text.
Follow the 'Tinted Grey' rule: The background is not pure #000000, it should be #0A0A0A.
Use framer-motion for page entrance and hover states. Ensure elements don't feel stiff.
The site should feel expensive and sterile. Rely on 1px solid dark olive borders (#556B2F/30) instead of blurry box-shadows.
For Shadcn components, override default padding and borders to match this rugged, sharp design system.
Ensure the popup has a delayed trigger and glassmorphism styling.
